question: Assuming today is Jan 20, and half of the votes from each state for a favorite brand have been counted. The color of each state corresponds to the brand that has received the most votes in that state so far. The results will be finalized on Feb 5. Which of the following is true?

options.A: Brand C will be the most popular brand overall.
options.B: Brand A will be the least popular brand overall.
options.D: Brand B will be the most popular brand overall.

explanation: While Candidate C currently dominates the map with the most colored states, the chart shows results as of Jan 20, but the voting ends on Feb 5. The remaining voting period could dramatically change the outcome, making it premature to predict which candidate will be most popular. The concealed uncertainty lies in the incomplete voting process that is not reflected in the chart.
